positive: A sophisticated minimalist illustration featuring a pair of stylized, abstract roaring animals (such as a lion and a fox) locked in a dynamic, elegant battle. The scene should be designed as a high-contrast, single-color silhouette against a creamy off-white background. The style must evoke Art Deco graphic design meets modern tattoo flash, utilizing bold, clean lines and negative space effectively. Composition must be perfectly centered, with the subjects filling the vertical space dramatically. Limited color palette of deep indigo and black only. Highly detailed etching quality, suitable for screen printing on apparel.
negative: blur, fuzzy, gradient, watermark, signature, text, logo, cropped, out of frame, artifacts, poorly drawn, bad anatomy, noise, low resolution, extra limbs, color variations
